name: Power Unleashed

abilities.name: Arcane Threads
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for non-(m), non-general actions from allies with Adaptable tokens within 8".

actions.name: Ritual Setup
actions.effects: Select any three friendly Scheme markers that are within 14" of another selected marker, ignoring LoS. All enemy models within the area formed by the three markers must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Stunned token. Then, remove two of the chosen markers.

extraction_notes: Mental Bind has Signature icon (dagger symbol) indicating it is a Signature action
Ritual Setup has Special icon (double diamond symbol) indicating it is a Special action
Arcane Threads ability excludes non-(m) actions, meaning non-Missile actions
Adaptable is referenced as a token type but not defined on this card
